architecture.summary: Dynamic marketplace discovery via cache dir scan; compare against each marketplace.json; leave existing plugins in place; reactivate llm-plugin-detector for on-demand loading

integrations.summary: N/A - internal CLI tooling, no external service integrations

performance.summary: N/A - CLI commands, no performance SLAs

security.summary: N/A - local filesystem operations only, no auth or sensitive data

edge-cases.summary: Error on unknown --plugin name; skip marketplace if marketplace.json unresolvable; leave existing non-core plugins in place
